About.metaDescription: Learn about RestaurantTools.ai — our mission to help restaurant owners discover and adopt the best AI tools for their business.
About.title: About
About.subtitle: We're on a mission to help restaurant owners navigate the AI revolution — so they can focus on what they do best: creating incredible dining experiences.
About.storyP1: RestaurantTools.ai was founded by a team of restaurant tech enthusiasts who saw a growing gap between AI innovation and restaurant adoption. While every industry was being transformed by artificial intelligence, most restaurant owners were left overwhelmed — unsure which tools were real, which were hype, and which would actually work for their business.
About.storyP2: We built this directory to bridge that gap. A single place where restaurant professionals can discover, compare, and choose AI tools with confidence.
About.missionText: To be the most trusted resource for restaurant owners looking to adopt AI. We believe technology should empower restaurants — not complicate them. Every tool in our directory is researched, categorized, and presented with the restaurant operator in mind.
About.curatedText: We don't list everything — we list what matters. Every tool is vetted for relevance and quality.
About.honestText: No pay-to-play rankings. Our evaluations are based on real capabilities, not advertising budgets.
About.restaurantFirstText: We think from the operator's perspective. If it doesn't help a real restaurant, it doesn't belong here.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with the RestaurantTools.ai team. Submit a tool, explore partnerships, or ask a question.
Contact.title: Get in
Contact.subtitle: Have a question, want to submit a tool, or explore a partnership? We'd love to hear from you.

Privacy.metaDescription: RestaurantTools.ai privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your data.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly, such as when you subscribe to our newsletter or submit a contact form. We also collect basic analytics data (page views, referral sources) through Google Analytics to improve our service.
Privacy.section2Text: We use collected information to operate and improve RestaurantTools.ai, send newsletter updates (if subscribed), respond to inquiries, and analyze site usage to enhance user experience.
Privacy.section3Text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who help us operate the site (e.g., hosting, analytics) under strict confidentiality agreements.
Privacy.section4Text: We use cookies and similar technologies for analytics and to remember your preferences. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
Privacy.section5Text: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at
Privacy.section6Text: For privacy-related questions, reach us at

Terms.metaDescription: RestaurantTools.ai terms of service — rules and guidelines for using our platform.
Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Text: By accessing RestaurantTools.ai, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our site.
Terms.section2Text: RestaurantTools.ai provides a curated directory of AI tools for the restaurant industry. Listings are for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any third-party tool listed.
Terms.section3Text: All content on this site — including text, graphics, logos, and design — is the property of RestaurantTools.ai and protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
Terms.section4Text: If you submit a tool or other content to us, you grant RestaurantTools.ai a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute that content on our platform.
Terms.section5Text: RestaurantTools.ai is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the site or reliance on listed tools.
Terms.section6Text: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
Terms.section7Text: Questions about these terms? Contact us at
